name: nexus-platform
description: Nexus Platform - Multi-tenant SaaS médico com RLS PostgreSQL

scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.db:migrate:dev: for f in supabase/migrations/*.sql; do psql -h localhost -U nexus -d nexusdev < "$f"; done
scripts.db:migrate:test: for f in supabase/migrations/*.sql; do psql -h localhost -U nexus -d nexus_test < "$f"; done
scripts.db:setup: docker compose up -d && sleep 10 && npm run db:migrate:dev && npm run db:seed:dev
scripts.db:setup:test: psql -h localhost -U nexus -d nexusdev -c "DO $$ BEGIN IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT FROM pg_database WHERE datname = 'nexus_test') THEN CREATE DATABASE nexus_test OWNER nexus; END IF; END $$;" && echo 'Banco de testes pronto!'
scripts.db:reset: npm run docker:down && docker volume rm nexus-platform_postgres_data 2>/dev/null || true && npm run db:setup
scripts.db:reset:test: psql -h localhost -U nexus -d nexusdev -c "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS nexus_test;" && psql -h localhost -U nexus -d nexusdev -c "CREATE DATABASE nexus_test OWNER nexus;" && echo 'Banco de testes recriado!'
scripts.test:clean: npm run db:reset:test && npm run db:migrate:test && npm run test
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test && npm run test:rls && npm run build
scripts.ci:test: npm run lint:fix && npm run format:check && npm run db:reset:test && npm run db:migrate:test && npm run test:clean
scripts.deploy:render: npm run build && npm run db:migrate:dev
scripts.deploy:staging: npm run ci && echo 'npm run db:migrate:staging'
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run ci && echo 'npm run db:migrate:prod'
